purpose: Controlled pilot smoke data for proving full lifecycle, standalone jobs, composable workflows, governed execution, proof, Operations, and Trade Memory.

scenarios.messy_input: Portuguese supplier selling 120 smart thermostats to a German buyer, DAP Berlin, 40% advance, balance after delivery, needs buyer VAT proof and shipment evidence.
Prepare a supplier advance payment intent for EUR 12,500, require finance approval and proof bundle before execution.
Run a sustainability and compliance check for EU electronics resale, flag missing origin and RoHS evidence.
Onboard Nordic Retail AB as buyer, collect identifiers, screen sanctions/adverse media, and expose Trade Passport context.
Request funding against a confirmed purchase order, prepare finance-readiness pack and partner offer workflow.
Upload a commercial invoice before a Trade Room exists; classify it, extract fields, suggest clearance, payment, and proof workflows.
